raw.message: Jouez et vivez votre histoire. Gratuitement.

hook.summary: Upbeat beach party scene with characters jumping in unison.
hook.visual_action: A group of diverse fantasy characters in summer attire jump and cheer on a sunny beach in slow motion.

scene_flow: Introduction with a group of characters celebrating on a tropical beach.
Fast-paced montage of combat abilities and boss encounters.
Social scenes showing character emotes and group dancing in a resort setting.
Brief look at crafting and non-combat activities like blacksmithing.
Closing title card with the game logo and free trial call to action.
audience_proxy: MMORPG enthusiasts and social gamers who enjoy character customization and diverse gameplay activities.
